  1. Defense
  2. Weapon Systems

Air & Missile Defense

Proven, precision air and missile defense at home and abroad

Boeing-built and supported air and missile defense systems protect the homeland and service members, civilians and critical infrastructure around the globe.
As threats evolve and proliferate, we’re focused on developing and delivering robust, effective and rapidly deployable capabilities to defend against them — from unmanned aerial systems to advanced cruise and long-range ballistic missiles.

Products

Aegis Ballistic Missile Defense

Sea-based defense shield

Boeing manufactures critical hardware for multiple variants of the Aegis Ballistic Missile Defense system’s sea-based interceptor — the Standard Missile-3 (SM-3) — ensuring precision in intercepting ballistic missile threats. SM-3 provides a maritime umbrella of protection against short- to medium-range ballistic missile threats during their midcourse phase of flight.

Directed Energy

Laser-focused battlefield defense

Boeing’s Laser & Electro-Optical Systems (LEOS) team develops scalable, efficient air-defense solutions to counter drones and other lower-tier threats in any environment. The company is committed to delivering ready, rapidly deployable high-energy laser systems for the evolving battlefield.

Ground-Based Midcourse Defense

America’s homeland defense shield

Boeing leads the integration, testing and readiness of the Ground-based Midcourse Defense (GMD) system, the United States’ only operationally deployed missile defense program capable of defending the entire U.S. homeland — including Alaska and Hawaii — against long-range ballistic missile attacks. GMD is designed to detect, intercept and destroy threats during their midcourse phase of flight.

Patriot Advanced Capability-3 Seeker

Intercept to protect

Boeing builds seekers that enable Patriot Advanced Capability-3 (PAC-3) interceptors to detect, track and defeat advanced threats — from hypersonic weapons and hostile aircraft to ballistic and cruise missiles. The Patriot air defense system is essential to the protection of service members, civilians and critical infrastructure worldwide against rapidly proliferating threats.

News

The Integrated Fires Protection Capability (IFPC) Increment 2 system is designed to defend fixed and forward operating bases against emergent aerial threats. (U.S. Army image)
